_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission grants, access reviews, and privilege escalation procedures.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-007 (AG, cosine: 0.411), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.407).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.652). Shared vocabulary: [escalation, privilege]. DCWF-only terms [ability, perform] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, controls, data, definitions, grants, manage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.909, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.047 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Ability to perform privilege escalation" and "Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission gra" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.493 < STS 0.652 (gap -0.159). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [ability, perform] and [access, controls, data] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [escalation, privilege]. DCWF-only: [ability, perform]. WIDAI-only: [access, controls, data, definitions, grants, manage].
